head: Business Intelligence Analyst
info: 中国 浙江省 杭州 · 3 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
【Job Responsibilities】
1、Responsible for collecting, organizing, and analyzing business data to provide data-driven support and insights for company decision-making.
2、Build and maintain data reporting systems, generating regular business reports to assist departments in understanding business performance.
3、Employ BI tools for data mining and modeling, identifying business issues and proposing improvement recommendations.
4、Collaborate closely with business teams to understand requirements, tailor data solutions, and enhance operational efficiency.
5、Monitor data quality, ensuring accuracy and consistency, and promptly address data issues.
【Job Requirements】
1、Bachelor's degree or above in Statistics, Information Management, Computer Science, or related fields.
2、More than 3 years of experience in BI or data analysis, proficient in SQL, Excel, and at least one BI tool (such as Tableau, Power BI, etc.).
3、Strong business acumen, able to extract key insights from data to support decision-making effectively.
4、Excellent communication skills to explain complex data analysis results to non-technical stakeholders.
5、Problem-solving capability, capable of independent thinking in a fast-paced environment, continuously improving data analysis processes.
company_box_content: About Lazada Group

Founded in 2012, Lazada Group is the leading eCommerce platform in Southeast Asia. We are accelerating progress in Indonesia, Malaysia, the Philippines, Singapore, Thailand and Vietnam through commerce and technology. With the largest logistics and payments networks in the region, Lazada is a part of our consumers’ daily lives in the region and we aim to serve 300 million shoppers by 2030. Since 2016, Lazada is the Southeast Asia flagship platform of the Alibaba Group powered by its cutting-edge technology infrastructure.
展开
company_description: The leading eCommerce platform in Southeast Asia, founded in 2012 and part of Alibaba Group, operating in six countries with a focus on technology-driven commerce and logistics networks.

head: 财务报表分析
info: 中国 上海市 · 2 个月前 · 22 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
工作职责：
1、分析报表配置与制作：对接各财务BP与业务负责人的经营分析与管理需求，基于自研线上化系统完成财务数据配置、财务分析报告制作；
2、数据分析与风险提示：复核报表数据以保证高准确度高质量交付；对报表进行数据分析，挖掘异常波动背后的业务原因，及时发现外部市场的变化或者内部策略上的问题；
3、规则梳理与流程制定：基于各业务线经营情况，与财务BP与业务负责人设计合理的分摊规则，并做准确的线上化配置；建立并优化线上化财务报表的生产标准流程与规范。
岗位需求：
1、本科以上学历，会计、数据分析等相关专业，具备基本的财务专业知识；
2、3 年以上财务分析相关经验，游戏、互联网行业相关经验者优先；
3、熟练掌握SQL/Python以进行数据清洗、加工、分析等；
4、具备良好的学习能力、沟通能力及抗压能力，认真、仔细、有责任心。
company_box_content: Founded in 2011, miHoYo creates products and experiences that are out of the imagination. Beyond games like Houkai Gakuen 2, Honkai Impact 3rd, Tears of Themis, Genshin Impact, Honkai: Star Rail, and Zenless Zone Zero, miHoYo is known for creating related IP across animation, comics, music, and merchandise.

Under the mission of "Tech Otakus Save the World," miHoYo remains committed to technological research and development, exploring cutting-edge technology, and developing industry-leading capabilities in the fields of animation rendering, artificial intelligence, and cloud gaming.
Headquartered in Shanghai, China, miHoYo has more than 5,000 employees spread across its various offices.
展开
company_description: miHoYo is a technology company founded in 2011, headquartered in Shanghai, with over 5,000 employees. It creates games and IPs like Genshin Impact and Honkai: Star Rail, focusing on animation, AI, and cloud gaming to deliver imaginative experiences.

head: 人力数据分析师-TikTok产品研发中台
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 1 个月前 · 24 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
职位描述
1、深入理解业务战略和人力资源体系，通过数据分析、行业调研、专家访谈等方式，诊断人力资源管理中的关键问题，设计优化方案，并推动执行落地；
2、构建并持续优化人力相关数据的分析模型，支持组织在人力投入、结构配置与发展路径等方面的战略决策；
3、高效的为招聘和HRBP团队提供数据报告，通过分析发现改进的关键点并推动业务团队改进。
职位要求
1、本科或以上学历；
2、对组织管理与人的行为有强烈好奇心，具备优秀的数据敏感度和分析能力，能够从复杂信息中提炼管理观察，并形成建议方案；
3、具备系统性思维，能够准确定义问题、建立分析假设，并设计兼顾实效与成本的可执行方案；
4、出色的沟通表达与跨部门影响力，能够通过数据叙事清晰传递分析结果与战略建议；
5、具备进取心、开放协作精神和抗压韧性，能在复杂环境中推动项目落地；
6、英文口语及书面语皆流利，可作为工作语言使用。
company_box_content: ByteDance is a global incubator of platforms at the cutting edge of commerce, content, entertainment and enterprise services - over 2.5bn people interact with ByteDance products including TikTok.
Creation is the core of ByteDance's purpose. Our products are built to help imaginations thrive. This is doubly true of the teams that make our innovations possible.

Together, we inspire creativity and enrich life - a mission we aim towards achieving every day. At ByteDance, we create together and grow together. That's how we drive impact - for ourselves, our company, and the users we serve. We are committed to building a safe, healthy and positive online environment for all our users.
We have over 110,000 employees based in more than 30 countries globally. Join us.
展开
company_description: ByteDance is a global technology company with products like TikTok, serving over 2.5 billion users and employing over 110,000 people in more than 30 countries. The company focuses on creativity and innovation in content and commerce, indicating a large multinational corporation.

head: Specialist, Business Insights - Shenzhen (商业数据与洞察专员 - 深圳)
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 2 周前 · 37 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
HK Express is Hong Kong’s first and only low-cost carrier, always offering great value, affordable fares on one of the youngest and most modern aircraft fleets in the world.
Like you, and just like many people across Asia, we love to travel and discover new places across the world’s most diverse and dynamic region

and at HK Express, we’re opening up new travel experiences that inspire and invigorate millions of people across the region we’re proud to call home. Everything we do is focused on encouraging the spirit of adventure. Our routes provide the inspiration and spontaneity to try somewhere new, disrupting monotonous modern life. As we continue to open up new routes, often in secondary and emerging destinations, our passengers will gain access to an incredible range of places, exploring hidden gems and experiencing local cultures.
We have a diverse and vibrant team that embodies the adventurous spirit of our customers, and loves to travel too. Join us in this journey to make your career even more fulfilling and rewarding.
Overview

As a Specialist, Business Insights, you will collaborate closely with various teams within Commercial department to support their data needs. Your core responsibility is to transform commercial and customer data into actionable insights that drive business growth and enhance commercial performance. You will design, develop, and manage dashboards and reports, ensuring that data is presented clearly, accurately, and in a timely manner to empower informed decision-making across the organization.
Role Purpose
Dashboard Creation and Reporting
Develop and manage performance dashboards for the Commercial team, ensuring timely updates and accuracy.
Build tailored visualizations that enhance data interpretation and supports decision-making and performance accountability.
Develop reports and presentations that are concise, easy to understand, and effectively convey insights and recommendations to stakeholders.
Market Research, Competitive Analysis and Customer Insights
Analyse historical data to support decision making and assist to form recommendation on revenue and pricing strategy. Propose and evaluate actions to improve commercial performance.
Conduct market landscape research including competitive analysis, desktop research and benchmarking exercises.
Support to conduct in-depth research to identify emerging trends and consumer preferences.
Database Management and Maintenance
Work closely with Data Analytics team and support the formulation of data structure.
Support data extraction and ensure data integrity, accuracy, and security.
Propose improvements to database functionality, such as automation, data integration, and enhanced reporting capabilities.
Data Analysis and Insights Generation

Analyse data from direct channels and other data sources to identify patterns, trends, and opportunities. Identify anomalies, and flag potential areas of concern. Prepare regular reports with insights and recommendations for optimisation.
Utilize Customer Experience Analytics and Digital Analytics tools to analyse digital experience, track user sessions, identify pain points, and uncover opportunities.

Implement data-driven improvements: Collaborate with the Digital Experience team to implement or test changes based on insights from aiming to improve website and app performance and drive conversion.
Analyze data from journey experience surveys and brand health trackers to identify key trends and issues, enabling timely actions and guiding long-term improvements through regular reporting.
Qualification
Bachelor’s degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Business Administration, Economic, Finance, Accounting, or other quantitative discipline.
Strong analytical and numerical skills, with experience in quantitative/data analysis and handling large datasets ideally. And strong attention to details and accuracy
Demonstrate aptitude for logical analysis, analytical mind, problem identification, and problem solving.
Adaptable, quick learner, able to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
Effective communicator and presenter, with stakeholder management and interpersonal skills.
Skilled in project management, able to prioritize and deliver results under pressure and tight deadlines.
Experience with data visualization tools (Looker Studio, Tableau) and programming (SQL, Python, Google Cloud) is preferred.
Good command of Chinese and English, Cantonese is a valued addition.
Desirable Qualities
Proactive, curious, detail-oriented self-starter with a growth mindset and interest in innovative solutions.
Comfortable influencing cross-functional teams and translating insights into actionable business decisions.
Strong project management skills and commitment to continuous improvement.
职位:
商业数据与洞察专员
地点:
深圳
汇报对象:
商业数据与洞察高级经理/经理
作为商业数据与洞察专员，您将与商务部团队密切协作，了解并满足他们的数据需求。您的核心职责是将商业与客户数据转化为可执行的洞察，推动业务增长并提升商业绩效。您将设计、开发和管理仪表板与报告，确保数据以清晰、准确、及时的方式呈现，以支持全组织的知情决策。
职责与工作内容:
Dashboard 仪表板创建与数据报告（商务洞察方向）
负责商业团队的仪表板创建与管理，确保数据更新及时、准确性高
根据业务需求定制可视化呈现，提升数据解读效率，支持决策与绩效追踪
编制简明扼要的商业报告与简报，清晰传达洞察与建议，突出关键发现、影响与行动建议
市场研究、竞争分析与客户洞察
通过市场研究、竞争对手分析和客户洞察，支持商业决策与策略制定，辅助决策并提出定价策略的优化建议
进行市场景观研究，包括竞争分析、市场环境评估、桌面研究和基准测试
支持开展深入研究，识别新兴趋势与消费者偏好
数据库管理与性能优化
与数据分析团队密切合作，支持数据结构的制定与改进
协助数据提取，确保数据完整性、准确性与安全性
提出数据库功能改进建议，如自动化、数据集成和增强报告能力
数据分析与洞察报告撰写
分析来自直接渠道及其他数据源的数据，识别模式、趋势与机会，标注异常并提出改进建议
借助客户体验分析和数字分析工具，分析体验、数字足迹、识别痛点并挖掘机会
与数字体验(客户体验)团队合作，基于洞察执行或测试改动，以提升网站和应用性能并推动转化。
分析客户旅程体验、品牌健康度评估等数据，识别关键趋势，定期汇报并推动持续优化及长期改进
任职资格
数学、统计学、计算机科学、工商管理、经济学、金融、会计或其他定量学科
较强的分析与数值能力，具备定量数据分析与处理大规模数据集的经验
具备逻辑分析、分析思维、问题识别与解决能力
适应性强、学习能力强，能在快节奏环境中独立工作并与团队协作
有效沟通与演示能力，具备利益相关者管理及人际交往技巧
项目管理能力，能在压力和紧迫的时限内优先排序并交付结果
有数据可视化工具经验（Looker Studio、Tableau）以及编程能力（SQL、Python、Google Cloud）者优先
中英文良好，粤语者为加分项
理想素质
积极主动、好奇、注重细节，具备成长型思维，乐于寻求创
解决方案快速学习、对新工具与方法保持热情
跨文化沟通与协作能力，善于在多团队环境中推动进展
能够影响跨职能团队并将洞察转化为可执行的商业决策
强烈的项目管理能力，持续改进意识
1. Develop and manage performance dashboards for the Commercial team, ensuring timely updates and accuracy.
2. Build tailored visualizations that enhance data interpretation and supports decision-making and performance accountability.
3. Develop reports and presentations that are concise, easy to understand, and effectively convey insights and recommendations to stakeholders.
1. Analyse historical data to support decision making and assist to form recommendation on revenue and pricing strategy. Propose and evaluate actions to improve commercial performance.
2. Conduct market landscape research including competitive analysis, desktop research and benchmarking exercises.
3. Support to conduct in-depth research to identify emerging trends and consumer preferences.
1. Work closely with Data Analytics team and support the formulation of data structure.
2. Support data extraction and ensure data integrity, accuracy, and security.
3. Propose improvements to database functionality, such as automation, data integration, and enhanced reporting capabilities.

1. Analyse data from direct channels and other data sources to identify patterns, trends, and opportunities. Identify anomalies, and flag potential areas of concern. Prepare regular reports with insights and recommendations for optimisation.
2. Utilize Customer Experience Analytics and Digital Analytics tools to analyse digital experience, track user sessions, identify pain points, and uncover opportunities.

3. Implement data-driven improvements: Collaborate with the Digital Experience team to implement or test changes based on insights from aiming to improve website and app performance and drive conversion.
4. Analyze data from journey experience surveys and brand health trackers to identify key trends and issues, enabling timely actions and guiding long-term improvements through regular reporting.

company_box_content: Here at HK Express, we are built on a culture of respect, opportunity, innovation and travel. We are the pioneer and aspire to build Hong Kong’s own, true low-cost carrier. We try our best to understand what our customers need. We can relate to the joy of their every travel, their excitement to explore every city and the delight they share with their close ones.

Which is why we are dedicated to offer the greatest value to our customers and to make traveling both possible and accessible to everyone. We are committed to low fares, inflight safety and personalized journeys, offering a variety of choices to satisfy individual preferences.

Currently, we are covering 26+ destinations, operating with a fleet of 28 aircrafts, mostly targeting at exotic Asian cities. We are planning to expand our network in the year to come, flying beyond Japan, China, Thailand or Taiwan, bringing more people on board in the pursuit of adventures!
展开
company_description: Hong Kong's first and only low-cost carrier, operating a fleet of 28 aircraft to over 26 destinations in Asia, focused on providing affordable travel and adventure experiences.

head: Data Specialist - Data & Analytics - Beijing(315212)
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 4 天前 · 23 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Pursue a Career with Impact

At Deloitte China, we are on a mission to nurture and empower our people to become deep subject matter experts. We offer the perfect platform to unleash your full potential and equip you to thrive on challenges, and partner with our clients to solve their most complex problems. A world of opportunities awaits. Start your adventure and journey with us.
About The Business

Deloitte brings world-class capabilities and high-quality service to clients, delivering the insights they need to address their most complex business challenges. In the digital era, technology innovation and business are inextricably connected to each other. Given the high demand of technology-enabled business, Deloitte professionals help our clients facing the most critical information and technology challenges in their business.

We provide a broad spectrum of services to help our clients make greater impact on finance strategy formulation and execution. Our practice leverages resources, skills and technical tools from our various disciplines to help executives fulfil their evolving, expanded and increasingly complex roles, particularly in the areas of complex finance and accounting, as well as the development and implementation of strategies, to facilitate greater efficiencies and enable increased profitability.
Work you'll do

Conduct in-depth qualitative and quantitative analyses of clients’ financial, operational, and user data by leveraging statistical methods and big data techniques. Identify key risk indicators (KRIs) and support audit teams in performing risk assessment procedures

Check data integrity by validating computational accuracy and completeness in both operational and financial data, while detecting diverse risks across internal and external data sources through multidimensional data verification processes

Independently prepare audit workpapers and reports aligned with Deloitte standards. Actively contribute to core tasks throughout the project lifecycle, including summarizing interview notes, collecting documentation, creating process flow diagrams, and executing multi-dimensional data analysis

Proactively identify and explore innovative applications of cutting-edge technologies within audit workflows. Provide valuable insights and professional support to technology innovation teams, driving advancements in intelligent auditing capabilities and fostering continuous improvement in audit processes
Produce a high-quality work products and collaborate with others across phases of the project lifecycle to deliver a superior client experience
Manage work in an ethical manner with continuous attention to quality standards and risk rules, and maintaining confidentiality

During your tenure with us, you will demonstrate and develop your leadership and professional capabilities in the following areas: Inspiring, Creating purpose, Driving agility, Building diverse capability, Influencing, Collaborating, Delivering value, Building the business, Analytical acumen, Effective communication, Engagement management/delivery excellence, Managing change, Managing quality & risk, Strategic thinking and problem solving, and Tech savviness.
We are looking for someone with
To be considered for this position, you must demonstrate skills and experience in the following areas:
Bachelor or equivalent degree in statistics, mathematics, computer science, or a related area
At least 3 years of experience in finance, accounting, external audit, data analysis or a related field (including finance systems)
Demonstrates understanding of their role in planning the audit, performing tests of controls, and/or performing substantive procedures
Leverages technology to capitalize on the power of analytics and choose the appropriate technique for the underlying data set
Well-developed relationship management skills including teamwork and collaboration
Understands the limitations in analysis software and required input data format and is able to tweak the dataset to derive an effective visual
Fluent in at least 1-2 programming languages
Proficient in SQL, Python, R, Microsoft Power BI, Word, Excel and PowerPoint etc.
Shape your future through impact that matters

For more than 100 years of history, Deloitte witnessed also had the honor to be part of the economic boom in China by providing industry-leading audit & assurance, consulting, risk advisory, financial advisory, tax & business advisory services to nearly 90% of the Fortune Global 500 Chinese companies and thousands of private companies. Deloitte China today carries on our centenary professionalism and strives to become the undisputed leader in professional services in China with strong responsibility and capabilities in digitalization and multidisciplinary services.
Deloitte has been named China's Top Employer since 2006, Universum's Most Attractive Employer in China since 2008, and the Best Workplaces in Greater China since 2019.

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment regardless of their background, experience, identity, ability or thinking style, and if you need assistance during the application process for accessibility reasons this is available upon request. The preferred candidate will be subject to background screening by Deloitte China or by their external third-party provider.
Accessibility assistance
If you need assistance or an accommodation during the recruitment process for accessibility reasons, there will be an opportunity for you to let us know what you need once you begin your application.
Ready to take on new challenges? Apply now!
Stay connected for the latest career opportunities, follow us on
Deloitte China Social Media
Why Deloitte China?
Deloitte China delivers a comprehensive range of audit & assurance, consulting, financial advisory, risk advisory and tax services to local, multinational and growth enterprise clients in China.
We are the
world's largest professional services firm
that changes the world, we lead with purpose and shared values.
We are the
market leader with digital and innovative solutions
, we create values for client through our multi-disciplinary services.
We are recognized as
Top Employer
in China by the Top Employers Institute* for 14th consecutive years, and made the top 3 for the first time this year!
We are certified as one of the
‘Best Workplaces™
in Greater China by Great Place to Work® in 2019

1. Conduct in-depth qualitative and quantitative analyses of clients’ financial, operational, and user data by leveraging statistical methods and big data techniques. Identify key risk indicators (KRIs) and support audit teams in performing risk assessment procedures

2. Check data integrity by validating computational accuracy and completeness in both operational and financial data, while detecting diverse risks across internal and external data sources through multidimensional data verification processes

3. Independently prepare audit workpapers and reports aligned with Deloitte standards. Actively contribute to core tasks throughout the project lifecycle, including summarizing interview notes, collecting documentation, creating process flow diagrams, and executing multi-dimensional data analysis

4. Proactively identify and explore innovative applications of cutting-edge technologies within audit workflows. Provide valuable insights and professional support to technology innovation teams, driving advancements in intelligent auditing capabilities and fostering continuous improvement in audit processes
5. Produce a high-quality work products and collaborate with others across phases of the project lifecycle to deliver a superior client experience
6. Manage work in an ethical manner with continuous attention to quality standards and risk rules, and maintaining confidentiality
1. Bachelor or equivalent degree in statistics, mathematics, computer science, or a related area
2. At least 3 years of experience in finance, accounting, external audit, data analysis or a related field (including finance systems)
3. Demonstrates understanding of their role in planning the audit, performing tests of controls, and/or performing substantive procedures
4. Leverages technology to capitalize on the power of analytics and choose the appropriate technique for the underlying data set
5. Well-developed relationship management skills including teamwork and collaboration
6. Understands the limitations in analysis software and required input data format and is able to tweak the dataset to derive an effective visual
7. Fluent in at least 1-2 programming languages
8. Proficient in SQL, Python, R, Microsoft Power BI, Word, Excel and PowerPoint etc.
company_box_content: 德勤推动进步。我们遍布全球的事务所帮助客户在任何选择竞争的地方成为领导者。德勤投资于具有不同才能和背景的杰出人士，并赋予他们权力，让他们在其他地方取得更大的成就。我们的工作将建议与行动和诚信相结合。我们相信，当我们的客户和社会变得更强大时，我们也会变得更强大。
展开

head: Data Analysis Specialist
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 1 周前 · 32 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Company Description

In GfK’s Market Insights business, we help our clients understand the dynamics of their marketplace including pricing, promotions, distribution and market share. Up-to-date retail sales data reveal how products are performing in the market.
Job Description
Assessment and optimization of data sample quality
2.Monitor the product data quality of various categories (processing the sales data of offline stores to check whether there are outliers and whether the data is reasonable)
Create and maintain data in the system for items required for reporting
Complete the inspection, maintenance and update of the total data
Report design and production.
Qualifications
Bachelor degree or above, major in statistics, information management, mathematics is preferred, good skill of Excel\SQL

2.2-3 years of data processing experience, have a certain understanding of durable consumer goods market, including: IT, communication and 3C digital products, household appliances, kitchen supplies, automotive supplies, personal care products, etc.
Strong data sensitivity and logical thinking ability
Good communication and collaboration skills, team spirit and awareness, patient and careful.
Additional Information
Our Benefits
Flexible working environment
Volunteer time off
LinkedIn Learning
Employee-Assistance-Program (EAP)
About NIQ

NIQ is the world’s leading consumer intelligence company, delivering the most complete understanding of consumer buying behavior and revealing new pathways to growth. In 2023, NIQ combined with GfK, bringing together the two industry leaders with unparalleled global reach. With a holistic retail read and the most comprehensive consumer insights—delivered with advanced analytics through state-of-the-art platforms—NIQ delivers the Full View™. NIQ is an Advent International portfolio company with operations in 100+ markets, covering more than 90% of the world’s population.
For more information, visit NIQ.com

company_box_content: NielsenIQ（NIQ）是全球领先的消费者研究与零售监测公司，致力于提供对消费者行为最全面的洞察，并揭示新的增长途径。2023年，NIQ与GfK完成合并，两家极具全球影响力的行业领导者实现整合。如今，NIQ在全球超过95个国家和地区开展业务，覆盖了97%的国内生产总值（GDP），凭借全面的零售解读与消费者洞察，通过卓越的商业智能平台和分析工具，传递市场全貌（The Full View ™）。
欲了解更多信息，欢迎访问 nielseniq.cn。

company_description: NIQ is the world's leading consumer intelligence company, formed by combining with GfK, with operations in 100+ markets.
